fields.summary: Provides options for creating an XPS document with <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKDocument" />.
fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

`SKDocumentXpsOptions` controls output settings when creating XPS documents via
<xref:SkiaSharp.SKDocument.CreateXps(SkiaSharp.SKWStream,SkiaSharp.SKDocumentXpsOptions)>.
Use it to specify resolution and image encoding preferences.

This type is a value type and does not require disposal.

## Examples

```csharp
using var stream = new SKFileWStream("output.xps");
var options = new SKDocumentXpsOptions
{
    Dpi = 150,
    AllowNoPngs = false,
};
using var document = SKDocument.CreateXps(stream, options);
using var page = document.BeginPage(595, 842);
page.DrawColor(SKColors.White);
document.EndPage();
document.Close();
```
]]></format>

fields.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the encoder is permitted to omit PNG encoding for images.
fields.value: <see langword="true" /> to allow images to be encoded without PNG when a more efficient format is available; <see langword="false" /> to require PNG encoding.

fields.summary: Gets or sets the rasterization resolution in dots per inch.
fields.value: The DPI value used when converting vector content to raster form.

fields.summary: Indicates whether this instance is equal to the specified <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKDocumentXpsOptions" />.
fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if both instances have equal field values; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

params.obj: The <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKDocumentXpsOptions" /> to compare with this instance.

fields.summary: Indicates whether this instance is equal to the specified object.
fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if <paramref name="obj" /> is an <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKDocumentXpsOptions" /> with the same values; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

params.obj: The object to compare with this instance.
